name: Shrimp Scampi III
recipeIngredient: 1 to 2 cloves Garlic, peeled and crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Under cold running water, remove the shells from the shrimp, leaving the last tail section attached.
Using a sharp, thin-bladed knife, make a shallow cut lengthwise down the back of each shrimp and wash out the sand vein.
If desired, the shrimp may be butterflied (cut lengthwise down the back of each shrimp, cutting almost completely through the shrimp, removing the sand vein).
2. In a shallow, 2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic baking dish, combine butter, lemon juice, parsley flakes, garlic to taste, and salt.
3. Heat uncovered in Microwave Oven for 2 minutes.
4. Add shrimp and stir to coat well.
If desired, sprinkle with paprika.
5. Continue heating uncovered in Microwave Oven for an additional 6 minutes, stirring the shrimp occasionally.
Cook just until the shrimp are pink and tender. Do not overcook; they will become tough.
Serves 3 to 4
Variation: Lobster, scallops, crabmeat, or any combination of these may be substituted for shrimp.
